columns.name: FKNR
columns.description: Unique identifier for the vare register entry

columns.name: TOLLTARIFFNR
columns.description: Unique identifier for the toll tariff

columns.name: KOMMENTAR
columns.description: Free text comment related to the vare register entry

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT
columns.description: The timestamp of when the vare register entry was last modified or created
columns.foreignKey: A_BESTHODE, A_BESTHODE, A_BESTLIN, A_FRAKT_OLINJER, A_KORRIGERINGER, A_ORDREHODE_EC, A_ORDREHODE_ENDR

columns.name: BRUKERID
columns.description: The identifier of the user who last modified or created the vare register entry

columns.name: MIN_SPIRE_PROS
columns.description: The minimum surcharge percentage applicable to the vare register entry

columns.name: START_DATO
columns.description: The start date for the validity period of the vare register entry

columns.name: SLUTT_DATO
columns.description: The end date for the validity period of the vare register entry

columns.name: RELEX_SORTIMENT
columns.description: The category or sortiment for the vare register entry in RelEx system

columns.name: RELEX_SESONG_FRA
columns.description: The start date of the season for the vare register entry in RelEx system

columns.name: RELEX_SESONG_TIL
columns.description: The end date of the season for the vare register entry in RelEx system

columns.name: TOLLTARIFFNR_LEV
columns.description: The toll tariff number for levied purposes related to the vare register entry

columns.name: OPPR_LAND
columns.description: The country of origin for the vare register entry

columns.name: SDS
columns.description: The SDS (Safety Data Sheet) code related to the vare register entry

columns.name: PARTISTYRING_D365FO
columns.description: The partistyring indicator for the vare register entry in D365FO system

columns.name: PRODUKTEIER
columns.description: The product owner for the vare register entry
